summary: Quantity overage on two line items. PO-2025-3003 authorised 10 desks (GOS-DSK) and 10 chairs (GOS-CHR); invoice bills 12 of each. GRN-3003-A confirms receipt of all 12 units per item but PO only covers 10. Overages of 2 units per line (GBP 570.00 desks + GBP 357.00 chairs = GBP 927.00 above PO). Monitors (GOS-MON) match exactly. Partial approval for 10 units per authorised line; 2-unit overage held pending supplemental PO or vendor credit note.

exceptions.description: GOS-DSK: Billed 12 units, PO authorises 10. Overage 2 units x GBP 285.00 = GBP 570.00
exceptions.resolution: Approve 10 units (GBP 2,850.00). Hold 2 units pending supplemental PO.

exceptions.description: GOS-CHR: Billed 12 units, PO authorises 10. Overage 2 units x GBP 178.50 = GBP 357.00
exceptions.resolution: Approve 10 units (GBP 1,785.00). Hold 2 units pending supplemental PO.

agent_insights: Partial approval: GBP 11,135.40 approved for immediate payment
GBP 927.00 held — requires supplemental PO or vendor credit note
GRN-3003-A confirms physical receipt of all 12 units per line
Monitor line GOS-MON exact match — no exception on monitors
